name: @proyecto-viviana/comparison
description: Astro comparison app for React Spectrum and Proyecto Viviana parity review

scripts.build:workspace-deps: vp run --filter @proyecto-viviana/solid-stately build && vp run --filter @proyecto-viviana/solidaria build && vp run --filter @proyecto-viviana/solidaria-components build && vp run --filter @proyecto-viviana/solid-spectrum build
scripts.test:button: vp run build && playwright test e2e/button-visual.spec.ts e2e/actionbutton-visual.spec.ts e2e/single-button-controls-visual.spec.ts e2e/grouped-button-controls-visual.spec.ts e2e/collection-button-controls-visual.spec.ts e2e/button-family-contract.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:buttons: vp run build && playwright test e2e/button-family-contract.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:catalogue: vp run build && playwright test e2e/catalogue-controls.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:calendar: vp run build && playwright test e2e/calendar-contract.spec.ts e2e/calendar-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:theme: vp run build && playwright test e2e/component-theme-contract.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:contract: vp run build && playwright test e2e/styled-contract.spec.ts e2e/button-family-contract.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:default: vp run build && playwright test e2e/default-state-visual.spec.ts e2e/default-state-pair-diff.spec.ts e2e/live-styled-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:pair: vp run build && playwright test e2e/default-state-pair-diff.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:a11y: vp run build && playwright test e2e/comparison-axe.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:dialog: vp run build && playwright test e2e/dialog-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:datefield: vp run build && playwright test e2e/datefield-visual.spec.ts e2e/modeled-controls-contract.spec.ts --grep DateField --reporter=line
scripts.test:timefield: vp run build && playwright test e2e/timefield-visual.spec.ts e2e/modeled-controls-contract.spec.ts --grep TimeField --reporter=line
scripts.test:datepicker: vp run build && playwright test e2e/datepicker-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:daterangepicker: vp run build && playwright test e2e/daterangepicker-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:rangecalendar: vp run build && playwright test e2e/rangecalendar-visual.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.types: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/proyecto-viviana-wrangler vp exec wrangler types src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: vp run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/proyecto-viviana-wrangler vp exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:dry-run: vp run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/proyecto-viviana-wrangler vp exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc
